hero.title: Ancient Wisdom for Modern Life
hero.subtitle: Discover timeless teachings that guide us through contemporary challenges

sections.title: Philosophical Foundations
sections.subtitle: Explore the six classical schools of Indian philosophy
sections.content: Dive deep into the profound wisdom of Nyaya, Vaisheshika, Samkhya, Yoga, Mimamsa, and Vedanta. Each school offers unique insights into the nature of reality, consciousness, and the path to liberation.

sections.title: Practical Applications
sections.subtitle: How ancient wisdom applies to modern challenges
sections.content: Learn how timeless principles from Indian philosophy can help you navigate relationships, career decisions, stress management, and personal growth in today's fast-paced world.

sections.title: Meditation & Mindfulness
sections.subtitle: Ancient techniques for modern well-being
sections.content: Discover meditation practices rooted in Indian traditions that promote mental clarity, emotional balance, and spiritual growth. Learn techniques that have been refined over thousands of years.

testimonials.title: What Our Students Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories of transformation through ancient wisdom

testimonials.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonials.content: The wisdom teachings have completely transformed how I approach challenges at work and in my personal life. The practical applications are incredible.

testimonials.name: Michael Chen
testimonials.content: The depth of understanding I've gained through these courses has enhanced my own teaching practice. The ancient wisdom is truly timeless.
